title: Remove hardcoded Railway tokens and leaked logs from codebase
description: The code-review pipeline is failing due to three critical security issues: (1) Railway API token hardcoded in deploy.js line 8, (2) same token hardcoded in railway-deploy.js line 9 fallback, (3) shared-memory/logs/latest.diff committed with 5543 chars of diff history that contains the Railway token. Remove the hardcoded token from both JS files (use ONLY process.env.RAILWAY_TOKEN with no fallback), run 'git rm --cached shared-memory/logs/latest.diff' to untrack it, and add 'shared-memory/logs/' to .gitignore.
acceptance: grep -r '2dc2f4ae-4e33-4ec4-a715-474a16792c00' deploy.js railway-deploy.js returns nothing; git ls-files shared-memory/logs/latest.diff returns nothing; code-review status becomes pass
